relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Golden Pearl
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]150[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

relics.name: Stone Calendar
relics.description: At the end of turn [blue]7[/blue], deal [blue]52[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Vambrace
relics.description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

relics.name: Letter Opener
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Skills in a single turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Kusarigama
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Storybook
relics.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: White Star
relics.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional [gold]Rare[/gold] card reward.

relics.name: Jeweled Mask
relics.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

relics.name: Lantern
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Shuriken
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

powers.name: Dexterity
powers.description: Dexterity improves Block gained from cards.

powers.name: Strength
powers.description: Strength adds additional damage to Attacks.

powers.name: Afterimage
powers.description: Whenever you play a card, gain 1 Block.

powers.name: Accuracy
powers.description: Shivs deal additional damage.

powers.name: Phantom Blades
powers.description: Shivs gain Retain. The first Shiv you play each turn deals 9 additional damage.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Golden Pearl
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]150[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

relics.name: Stone Calendar
relics.description: At the end of turn [blue]7[/blue], deal [blue]52[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Vambrace
relics.description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

relics.name: Letter Opener
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Skills in a single turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Kusarigama
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Storybook
relics.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: White Star
relics.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional [gold]Rare[/gold] card reward.

relics.name: Jeweled Mask
relics.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

relics.name: Lantern
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Shuriken
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

hand.line: Expertise [1]: Draw cards until you have 6 in your Hand. Exhaust.

Survivor [1]: Gain 12 Block. Discard 1 card. Exhaust.

draw.line: Backflip [1]: Gain 5 Block. Draw 2 cards. Exhaust.

Leading Strike [1]: Deal 3 damage. Add 2 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Strangle+ [1]: Deal 10 damage. Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 3 HP. Exhaust.

exhaust.line: Blade Dance [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.

Deflect [0]: Gain 4 Block. Exhaust.

Piercing Wail [1]: ALL enemies lose 6 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Shiv*18 [0]: Retain. Deal 4 damage. Exhaust.
Storm of Steel [1]: Discard your Hand. Add 1 Shiv into your Hand for each card discarded. Exhaust.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Golden Pearl
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]150[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

relics.name: Stone Calendar
relics.description: At the end of turn [blue]7[/blue], deal [blue]52[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Vambrace
relics.description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

relics.name: Letter Opener
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Skills in a single turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Kusarigama
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Storybook
relics.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: White Star
relics.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional [gold]Rare[/gold] card reward.

relics.name: Jeweled Mask
relics.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

relics.name: Lantern
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Shuriken
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

hand.line: Acrobatics [1]: Draw 3 cards. Discard 1 card. Exhaust.

discard.line: Strike [1]: Deal 6 damage. Exhaust.

exhaust.line: Blade Dance [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Blade Dance+ [1]: Add 4 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.

Cloak and Dagger [1]: Gain 6 Block. Add 1 Shiv into your Hand. Exhaust.
Defend*3 [1]: Gain 5 Block. Exhaust.
Deflect [0]: Gain 4 Block. Exhaust.
Expertise [1]: Draw cards until you have 6 in your Hand. Exhaust.
Neutralize+ [0]: Deal 4 damage. Apply 2 Weak. Exhaust.
Piercing Wail [1]: ALL enemies lose 6 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Shiv*19 [0]: Retain. Deal 4 damage. Exhaust.
Storm of Steel [1]: Discard your Hand. Add 1 Shiv into your Hand for each card discarded. Exhaust.
Survivor [1]: Gain 8 Block. Discard 1 card. Exhaust.

ascension_effects.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] spawn more often.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.

glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]150[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

relics.description: At the end of turn [blue]7[/blue], deal [blue]52[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Vambrace
relics.description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

relics.name: Letter Opener
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Skills in a single turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Kusarigama
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Storybook
relics.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: White Star
relics.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional [gold]Rare[/gold] card reward.

relics.name: Jeweled Mask
relics.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

relics.name: Lantern
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Shuriken
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Neow's Torment
relics.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: The Chosen Cheese
relics.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.description: If you end your turn without [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.name: Pael's Blood
relics.description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.

relics.name: Bing Bong
relics.description: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], add one additional copy.

relics.name: Festive Popper
relics.description: At the start of each combat, deal [blue]9[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue].

relics.name: Jeweled Mask
relics.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

relics.name: Letter Opener
relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Skills in a single turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Tiny Mailbox
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], procure [blue]2[/blue] random potions.

relics.name: War Paint
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random Skills.

glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

relics.description: At the start of your first [blue]3[/blue] turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next rooms to travel to [blue]0[/blue] times.

relics.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].

relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.description: Upon pickup, replace [gold]Ring of the Snake[/gold] with [gold]Ring of the Drake[/gold].

relics.description: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.

relics.name: Jeweled Mask
relics.description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

relics.description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

relics.name: Planisphere
relics.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]5[/green] HP.

relics.name: Shuriken

Piercing Wail [1]: ALL enemies lose 6 Strength this turn. Exhaust.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
